about.story: Since 2024, we have been helping our clients reliably and efficiently deliver cargo worldwide. Our experience and professional team are ready to solve any logistics challenge.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We help you find answers to your questions

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Delivery time depends on the route and transport type. Road transport 5-15 days, rail 15-25 days.

items.question: How can I track my shipment?
items.answer: Each shipment is assigned a unique tracking number. Enter it on our website or app to track in real-time.

items.question: Are shipments insured?
items.answer: Yes, all shipments are automatically insured. Additional insurance is available.

items.question: Do you help with customs clearance?
items.answer: Yes, we offer complete customs clearance and consulting services.

items.question: Do you transport dangerous goods?
items.answer: Yes, with special permits. Please inform us in advance.

items.question: How is pricing calculated?
items.answer: Price depends on weight, volume, destination, and transport type.

sections.title: Information Collection
sections.content: We collect the following information from users: name, phone number, email address, and shipping-related data. This information is used solely for service delivery purposes.

sections.title: Use of Information
sections.content: Collected data is used for the following purposes: processing orders, providing shipment tracking services, contacting customers, and improving service quality.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We employ modern security measures to protect users' personal information. Data is stored in encrypted form and is not shared with third parties without authorization.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: Our website uses cookies. Cookies are used to improve the browsing experience. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions about our privacy policy, please contact us at info@das-pay.uz or call +998 99 866 16 56.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Terms and conditions for using DasPay services

sections.title: General Terms
sections.content: By using the DasPay website, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

sections.title: Services
sections.content: DasPay provides international freight transportation, warehouse services, customs clearance, and logistics consulting services. Service prices and terms are agreed upon individually.

sections.title: User Obligations
sections.content: Users must provide accurate and correct information. DasPay is not responsible for issues arising from incorrect information.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: DasPay is not liable for delays or damages caused by events beyond its control (force majeure). All shipments are insured.

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
sections.content: All disputes are resolved through negotiation. If no agreement is reached, disputes are resolved in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

footer.description: DasPay — Uzbekistan's leading international logistics company. Since 2024, providing reliable freight services worldwide.
